source:
- 4.2.6.1.1 UID This is the unique identifier of this row in the DataRemovalMechanism table. This column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host.
- 4.2.6.1.2 ActiveDataRemovalMechanism This column value selects which Data Removal Mechanism in the Supported Data Removal Mechanism field in the Supported Data Removal Mechanism feature descriptor is active and will be used to remove data upon execution of
title: UID

source: the Revert method, the RevertSP method or the GenKey method. If an attempt is made to set the ActiveDataRemovalMechanism column value to an unsupported value of the data_removal_mechanism type, then the Set method invocation SHALL result in the method failing with the status INVALID_PARAMETER.
title: UID
